title: I wanted more from life: How IIT Guwahati is helping me rewrite my future
description: This sophomore at IIT Guwahati, pursuing Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, says that after two years in my degree, he has become a much better person – socially, technically, and culturally.
content:
Early life and motivation
I am 19, a sophomore at IIT Guwahati pursuing Data Science and Artificial Intelligence as my major. I come from the steel city of Jamshedpur, Jharkhand, while my roots are connected to Odisha. I mostly grew up in Jamshedpur,... [7185 chars]

title: FAA accepting bids for AI system to assist air traffic controllers
description: The FAA is working to develop artificial intelligence software to help air traffic controllers manage flights across the nation's airspace.
content:

title: JU, NIELIT conduct interactive session on AI skill training
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Apr 18: The Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE), University of Jammu, in collaboration with the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT), Jammu, organized an interactive session on Artificial Intelligence (AI) skill training for its students today. Two skill-based training programmes-Fundamentals of Data Annotation Using Python and Fundamentals of Data Curation Using Python-are currently being conducted for the students of CDOE by officers from NIELIT, Jammu, under a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed between […]

title: New artificial intelligence bots could drain nation's cash machines
description: British banks are set to be given early access to stress-test their cyber defences against Claude Mythos, a state-of-the-art AI bot.
content:

title: ‘No such thing as absolute safety’: Japan embraces nuclear post-Fukushima
description: The country is rapidly moving to restart reactors as artificial intelligence increases electricity demand and foreign wars choke gas supplies.
content:
This week, Japan will open its 16th reactor since the 2011 Fukushima nuclear accident — at a nuclear plant run by the same utility that oversaw Daiichi during the meltdown.
